svg.aria-label: KyzoDB at a glance: one engine five models, every answer accountable, time is a coordinate, runs everywhere identically, serializable and durable, proven not asserted.
svg.text: At a glance
What the engine gives you, and why you can believe it.
One engine, five models
Facts, graph, vectors, full-text, and bitemporal time answer together in one
language, one transaction. A vector search is a join; a graph walk is recursion.
Every answer accountable
It replays byte-identically, names the premises that entailed it, or refuses
with a typed reason. Never a panic, never a silent wrong row.
Time is a coordinate
As-of reads, interval values, and between-two-instants diffs are query
operators. “What did we know on Tuesday?” is a seek, not a log replay.
Runs everywhere, identically
Pure Rust, zero C/C++: the same engine, the same bytes, as a server,
embedded, in a browser tab, or on the edge.
Serializable & durable
SSI transactions, crash- and power-cut-tested recovery, deterministic replay
of an ordered log.
Proven, not asserted
Every generated query is answered twice: optimized engine vs. an independent
naive oracle, and must match byte for byte.
